title: opt_share: unsound optimization (start offset ignored when merging)
body:
```
$ cat t3.v
module top(input [3:0] A, B, C, input S, output [2:0] O);

wire [3:0] tb = A + B;
wire [3:0] tc = A + C;

assign O = S ? tb[3:1] : tc[3:1];

endmodule
$ yosys t3.v -p 'eval -set S 0 -set A 2 -set B 0 -set C 0'
[...]
Eval result: \O = 3'001.
[...]
$ yosys t3.v -p 'opt_share; eval -set S 0 -set A 2 -set B 0 -set C 0'
[...]
Eval result: \O = 3'010.
[...]2
```
code_blocks:

module top(input [3:0] A, B, C, input S, output [2:0] O);

wire [3:0] tb = A + B;
